title: lastrea mexicana
intro: Lastrea mexicana, also known as the Mexican fern, is a species of fern native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lastrea mexicana include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from pain and inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties in traditional medicine.
